metadata.credit: Pick order and tier list provided by Draftsim
metadata.author: Dan from Draftsim
metadata.rating_system_note: Tier ratings sourced from Draftsim's TLA pick order page (https://draftsim.com/TLA-pick-order.php). The page renders dynamically; ratings below are reconstructed from Draftsim's Limited Set Review (https://draftsim.com/mtg-tla-limited-set-review/) by Andrew Quinn, mapping X/10 ratings to tier letters (9-10=S, 8=A, 7=B, 6=C, 4-5=D, 0-3=F), and cross-referenced with Bryan Hohns' (Veveil) draft guide (https://draftsim.com/mtg-tla-draft-guide/). All data belongs to Draftsim.

tier_key.S: Bomb — Near-game-winning card; take over almost any other card in the pack.
tier_key.A: Exceptional — Strong reason to be in its color; first-pick quality.
tier_key.D: Playable — Acceptable filler; plays a role in specific decks.
tier_key.F: Unplayable / Near-unplayable — Avoid unless no other options.

categories.description: Near-game-winning cards. Take over almost any other card in the pack. First-pick regardless of colors.

Acceptable filler. Play a specific role; not always in every deck.
